model_visibility: The built-in tool does not expose a model identifier.

artifacts.alpha_policy: intentionally opaque fullscreen background; no alpha channel and no tRNS chunk

prompt_summary: Wide painterly ash-wasteland companion to the existing portrait key art, with a dark low-detail central 32 percent, distant ruined road silhouettes and restrained embers in both side thirds; no text, UI, logo, central vehicle, foreground character or watermark.
postprocess: Deterministic high-quality bicubic resample from 1672x941 to 2048x1152; no crop, compositing or color replacement.
